    B

    bindTo(MeterRegistry, HardwareAbstractionLayer, OperatingSystem) - Static method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Convenience method to create and bind all OSHI metrics in one call.
    bindTo(MeterRegistry, SystemInfoProvider) - Static method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Convenience method to create and bind all OSHI metrics in one call.
    build() - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Builds the OshiMetrics instance with the configured settings.
    builder(HardwareAbstractionLayer, OperatingSystem) - Static method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Creates a new builder for selective metric registration.
    builder(SystemInfoProvider) - Static method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Creates a new builder for selective metric registration.

    C

    ContainerMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for container metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    ContainerMetrics(OperatingSystem, CgroupInfo) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.ContainerMetrics
    Creates a new ContainerMetrics binder.
    CpuMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system CPU metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    CpuMetrics(CentralProcessor) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.CpuMetrics
    Creates a new CpuMetrics binder.

    D

    DiskMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system disk controller metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    DiskMetrics(Supplier) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.DiskMetrics
    Creates a new DiskMetrics binder.

    E

    enableContainer(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable container metrics (cpu time, memory usage/available).
    enableCpu(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable CPU metrics (time, frequency, counts).
    enableDisk(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable disk metrics (io, operations, io_time, limit).
    enableFileSystem(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable filesystem metrics (usage, utilization, limit).
    enableGeneral(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable general metrics (uptime, process count).
    enableMemory(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable memory metrics (usage, limit, utilization).
    enableNetwork(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable network metrics (io, packets, errors, connections).
    enablePaging(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable paging/swap metrics (usage, utilization, operations).
    enableProcess(boolean) - Method in class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
    Enable or disable current process metrics (cpu, memory, disk, threads, faults, uptime).

    F

    FileSystemMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system filesystem metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    FileSystemMetrics(Supplier) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.FileSystemMetrics
    Creates a new FileSystemMetrics binder.

    G

    GeneralMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for general system metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    GeneralMetrics(OperatingSystem) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.GeneralMetrics
    Creates a new GeneralMetrics binder.

    M

    MemoryMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system memory metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    MemoryMetrics(GlobalMemory) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.MemoryMetrics
    Creates a new MemoryMetrics binder.

    N

    NetworkMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system network metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    NetworkMetrics(Supplier, InternetProtocolStats) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.NetworkMetrics
    Creates a new NetworkMetrics binder.

    O

    oshi.metrics - package oshi.metrics
    Micrometer metric binders for OSHI system metrics, following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    OshiMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    Entry point for OSHI system metrics.
    OshiMetrics(HardwareAbstractionLayer, OperatingSystem) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Creates a new OshiMetrics instance that registers all metrics.
    OshiMetrics(SystemInfoProvider) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
    Creates a new OshiMetrics instance that registers all metrics.
    OshiMetrics.Builder - Class in oshi.metrics
    Builder for selective metric registration.

    P

    PagingMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for system paging/swap metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    PagingMetrics(VirtualMemory) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.PagingMetrics
    Creates a new PagingMetrics binder.
    ProcessMetrics - Class in oshi.metrics
    MeterBinder for process-level metrics following OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.
    ProcessMetrics(Supplier) - Constructor for class oshi.metrics.ProcessMetrics
    Creates a new ProcessMetrics binder.
